entities.name: LEAF SENESCENCE
entities.description: The ultimate phase in the life cycle of leaves involving nutrient recycling and chlorophyll breakdown to maintain plant fitness.

entities.name: NUTRIENTS
entities.description: Substances recycled during senescence and mobilized from leaves to developing organs.

entities.name: PLANT FITNESS
entities.description: The overall health and survival capability of the plant maintained by nutrient recycling.

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE SUCCESS
entities.description: The ability of the plant to successfully reproduce, supported by nutrient recycling.

entities.name: YELLOWING
entities.description: The earliest visible manifestation of leaf senescence resulting from chlorophyll breakdown.

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL
entities.description: The green pigment whose breakdown initiates the yellowing process during leaf senescence.

entities.name: MACROMOLECULES
entities.description: Large molecules that undergo coordinated disassembly during the degradation process of senescence.

entities.name: GENETIC AND MOLECULAR CONTROL
entities.description: The intricate network of regulators that coordinate leaf senescence spatio-temporally.

entities.name: INTERNAL AND EXTERNAL CUES
entities.description: Factors that influence the genetic and molecular regulators of the senescence process.

entities.name: OMICS TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Advanced technologies used to expand the understanding of the genetic and molecular basis of leaf ageing.

entities.name: MUTANT RESOURCES
entities.description: Genetic materials used as tools to study the molecular basis of leaf senescence.

entities.name: MOLECULAR ANALYSES METHODOLOGIES
entities.description: Scalable techniques used to analyze the molecular basis of leaf ageing.

entities.name: MULTIDIMENSIONAL DATA
entities.description: Complex data integrated to gain insights into the genetic and molecular basis of leaf ageing.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: External factors that interrelate with the terminal phase of leaf development.

entities.name: CROP QUALITY
entities.description: A desirable characteristic of crops that can be improved by manipulating leaf senescence.

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The yield or output of crops that can be improved by manipulating leaf senescence.
